STS2_WINE_FOX_EVENT_DESERT_PYRAMID.title: Desert Temple
STS2_WINE_FOX_EVENT_DESERT_PYRAMID.pages: A vast desert suddenly appears before you, with a temple at its center. Sand trickles from cracks in the ceiling, and the air feels ancient and dangerous. You spot a dark sandstone platform at the bottom with several chests and a pressure plate. Go down and take a look?
Too dangerous. Better not stay here.
There are 3 chests. Which one will you open?
You open the chest. As expected, there's something good inside.
You find an enchanted book. The moment you touch the page, you feel stronger.
